message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11484","justification":"Nationally representative survey of the German population with rich coverage of political behaviour and attitudes, social behaviour and attitudes, religion and values, and perceptions of economic conditions in Germany in 2010."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2012","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11649","justification":"Covers Germany in 2012 with modules on political attitudes, trust in institutions and government, social inequality, religion and value orientations, and subjective economic conditions."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12127","justification":"Includes indicators on political behaviour and attitudes, social inequality and exclusion, social behaviour, religion and values, and economic situation assessments for Germany in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12806","justification":"German sample with extensive questions on political trust, party preferences, social inequality, cultural and national identity, and evaluations of economic conditions in 2016."},{"title":"German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13325","justification":"National survey for Germany including modules on political participation, government institutions, social inequality and exclusion, religion, and value orientations at the end of the 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2010 (Round 5) - Germany","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=5257&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.10988","justification":"German subsample of ESS Round 5 (2010) with detailed measures of political behaviour and attitudes, trust in government, social exclusion and equality, and values; allows analysis of Germany during the early 2010s."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2012 (Round 6) - Germany","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=5310&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.11877","justification":"German data for 2012 with extensive indicators on political systems and organisations, social attitudes, economic insecurity, and cultural and national identity."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2014 (Round 7) - Germany","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=5271&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.12253","justification":"German subsample from 2014 covering political engagement, attitudes to government, social inequality and exclusion, and value orientations in mid‑decade Germany."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2016 (Round 8) - Germany","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=6931&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.12848","justification":"Provides German data for 2016 on trust in political institutions, perceptions of economic conditions, social behaviours and attitudes, and cultural identity and migration."},{"title":"European Social Survey 2018 (Round 9) - Germany","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=7392&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.13316","justification":"German component of ESS Round 9 (2018) with variables on political behaviour, perceptions of democracy and government, social exclusion, religion and values, and economic and social conditions toward the end of the 2010s."}]}
